regional_cost_note: Bricklayers in Upper Hutt typically charge $125–$190/m² for single-skin brickwork, $115–$170/m² for blockwork, and $210–$420/m² for heritage restoration. Upper Hutt trades often price at Wellington rates given the shared labour pool. Brick is less common in NZ new builds but remains popular for retaining walls, paving, and heritage restoration.
